core_skills: Software development, Scalable application development, Backend programming, Python, Django
skill_match_scores: Software development:1.0, Scalable application development:0.0, Backend programming:1.0, Python:1.0, Django:0.0
must_have_quals: 5+ years of experience in software development, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, or equivalent work experience, Experience building scalable, production-ready applications, Experience successfully leading large, complex projects and technical initiatives from discovery to completion, Strong technical leadership skills; proven track record of taking initiative to improve processes and the codebase, Champion of industry best practices, ownership, and accountability, Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, and both to technical and non-technical audiences, Technical experience with backend languages and frameworks, such as: Python: Django/FastAPI/Flask, Technical experience with various data storage solutions, such as: MySql/Postgres, MongoDB, Technical experience with cloud technologies, observability tooling, CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure-as-code
preferred_quals: Familiarity with ShapeUp software development methodology, Frontend experience, especially with JavaScript: ReactJS/TypeScript, Experience working in high-performing SaaS companies, Experience with mentorship, Experience working with third-party authentication providers, especially with Okta
core_responsibilities: Lead large, complex software projects and/or technical initiatives; break down work for, and provide guidance to, more junior engineer contributors, Collaborate directly with internal stakeholders (both technical and non-technical) to uncover requirements, ensuring continuous clear communication, Provide updated estimates regarding ongoing work, and suggest deadline or scope changes as appropriate, Build and maintain observability tooling and helpful documentation, Triage and prioritize incoming requests and internal bug reports
job_summary: SpotOn is a cutting-edge software company dedicated to redefining the merchant services industry. They are seeking a Senior Software Engineer I to lead large, complex software projects, collaborate with internal stakeholders, and build and maintain observability tooling and documentation.
